display_text: Spark of Courage, Tier Neutral: A neutral item that grants Courage passive: provides 10 bonus damage while the hero is above 50% health and 5 bonus armor while below. This creates a dynamic defensive-offensive scaling effect that rewards maintaining a health advantage. Stats: Damage: 10, Armor: 5.
